# Open Magi Agent Documentation Index

This repository contains the public source docs for Magi Agent.

Read in this order:

1. docs/README.md
2. docs/getting-started.md
3. docs/quickstart.md
4. docs/cli.md
5. docs/configuration.md
6. docs/customization.md
7. docs/runtime.md
8. docs/tools.md
9. docs/contracts.md
10. docs/hooks.md
11. docs/memory.md
12. docs/skills.md
13. docs/automation.md
14. docs/integrations.md
15. docs/api.md
16. docs/deployment.md
17. docs/security.md
18. docs/architecture.md
19. docs/reference.md
20. docs/troubleshooting.md
